---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
description: Report a bug or issue with RuralConnect
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Category
- [ ] Hardware (Raspberry Pi, modem, antenna, battery, etc.)
- [ ] Firmware (network switching daemon, display UI, web interface)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing/Field Issue

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 📸 Expected vs. Actual Behavior
**Expected behavior:**
What you expected to happen

**Actual behavior:**
What actually happened

## 📎 Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or error logs:
```
Paste error message or log here
```

## 💻 Environment
- **Raspberry Pi Model:** (Pi Zero 2W, Pi 4, Pi 5, etc.)
- **OS:** (Raspberry Pi OS Lite, Ubuntu, etc.)
- **Python Version:** (e.g., 3.9, 3.11)
- **Modem:** (Quectel RM500Q-GL, etc.)
- **Firmware Version:** (if applicable)
- **Branch/Commit:** (e.g., main, develop, commit SHA)

## 🌍 Location/Region
Where were you testing this? (helps with carrier-specific issues)
- Region: 
- Carriers: (e.g., Jio, Airtel, Vi)

## 📱 Signal Conditions
- [ ] Strong signal (RSSI > -80 dBm)
- [ ] Weak signal (RSSI -80 to -100 dBm)
- [ ] Very weak signal (RSSI < -100 dBm)
- [ ] No signal / switching between networks

## ➕ Additional Context
Any other context that might help us understand the issue?

## 🔗 Related Issues
Are there any related issues? Link them here with #issue-number
